college_name: College of International Transport and Logistics
parent_institution: Arab Academy for Science, Technology and Maritime Transport (AASTMT)

campus.regional_role: Strategic logistics education hub supporting Egypt’s transformation into a global trade and transport center

college_identity.description: A regional and international center of excellence in logistics, supply chain management, and international transport education, research, and professional development.
unique_positioning: Only college in MENA offering bilingual Bachelor degrees in Trade Logistics and International Transport
Strong industry-driven, applied, and research-oriented model
Deep integration with ports, airports, logistics zones, and government authorities

vision_mission.vision: To be a leading regional and international center of excellence in transport, logistics, and global trade education—driving innovation, sustainability, and digital transformation in shaping the future of integrated global supply chains.
vision_mission.mission: To prepare competent, ethical, and globally oriented professionals in transport, logistics, and international trade through excellence in education, applied research, and collaboration with industry and academic partners.

establishment_and_history.historical_note: CITL evolved from logistics education within AASTMT to become a standalone college serving Egypt, the Arab region, and Africa.

national: National Authority for Quality Assurance and Accreditation of Education (NAQAAE)
international: Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business (AACSB)

benefits: Direct alignment with Global 2000 company standards

majors.focus: Transport operations, ports, terminals, multimodal transport, sustainability
Procurement, inventory, lean supply chains, digital and sustainable SCM
Customs, freight, trade finance, global logistics operations

international_projects: EU-funded logistics and supply chain initiatives
Consulting studies for League of Arab States

admission_requirements.language_requirement: English placement or B2 CEPT for Hull program
additional_requirements: Personal interview for Hull dual degree
